items.title: As part of their moves to create the space to trade for Nic Claxton and sign Norman Powell, the Chicago Bulls renounced the FA rights to the following players:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
As part of their moves to create the space to trade for Nic Claxton and sign Norman Powell, the Chicago Bulls renounced the FA rights to the following players:

Talen Horton-Tucker
Yuki Kawamura
Mac McClung
Lachlan Olbrich
Nick Richards
Collin Sexton
Matt Thomas
Guerschon Yabusele

items.title: Bryson Graham on Nic Claxton:
items.author: Drew
items.body_excerpt:
Bryson Graham on Nic Claxton:

"Last year, we weren't a great defensive team."

Graham said Claxton can "shore up our back line" and highlighted his ability to defend both at the level of the screen and in drop coverage.

items.title: Sources: The Brooklyn Nets will select Isaiah Evans with the No. 33 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft. Evans is headed to the Minnesota Timberwolves as part of a 3-team trade, which also landed Julius Randle in Brooklyn and sent Nic Claxton to the Bulls.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: The Brooklyn Nets will select Isaiah Evans with the No. 33 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft. Evans is headed to the Minnesota Timberwolves as part of a 3-team trade, which also landed Julius Randle in Brooklyn and sent Nic Claxton to the Bulls.

items.title: Sources: The Brooklyn Nets will select Joshua Jefferson with the No. 28 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft. Brooklyn acquired this pick from the Minnesota Timberwolves as part of a 3-team deal, which also landed Julius Randle in Brooklyn and sent Nic Claxton to the Chicago Bulls.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: The Brooklyn Nets will select Joshua Jefferson with the No. 28 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft. Brooklyn acquired this pick from the Minnesota Timberwolves as part of a 3-team deal, which also landed Julius Randle in Brooklyn and sent Nic Claxton to the Chicago Bulls.
